languages.text: "Сержант, не замечал ли ты странной световой решетки в небе и силового поля на выходе из резиденции?"
"Sergeant, have you observed the strange light grid in the sky or the force field at the entrance to the residence?"
languages.original_text: "Сержант, не замечал ли ты странной световой решетки в небе и силового поля на выходе из резиденции?"

traits.locale_text: "Sergeant, have you observed the strange light grid in the sky or the force field at the entrance to the residence?"
"Sergeant, have you observed the strange light grid in the sky or the force field at the entrance to the residence?"
"Sergeant, have you observed the strange light grid in the sky or the force field at the entrance to the residence?"

languages.text: «Sargento, ¿ha reparado en la extraña cuadrícula luminosa del cielo o en el campo de fuerza en la entrada de la residencia?».
languages.original_text: "Sergeant, have you observed the strange light grid in the sky or the force field at the entrance to the residence?"

traits.locale_text: «Sargento, ¿ha reparado en la extraña cuadrícula luminosa del cielo o en el campo de fuerza en la entrada de la residencia?».

languages.text: “军士，你有注意到天上那奇怪的光栅，或者官邸入口的力场吗？”
languages.original_text: "Sergeant, have you observed the strange light grid in the sky or the force field at the entrance to the residence?"

traits.locale_text: “军士，你有注意到天上那奇怪的光栅，或者官邸入口的力场吗？”

languages.text: « Sergent, avez-vous remarqué l'étrange grille lumineuse dans le ciel et le champ de force, à l'entrée de la résidence ? »
languages.original_text: "Sergeant, have you observed the strange light grid in the sky or the force field at the entrance to the residence?"

traits.locale_text: « Sergent, avez-vous remarqué l'étrange grille lumineuse dans le ciel et le champ de force, à l'entrée de la résidence ? »

languages.text: "Çavuş, gökyüzündeki o tuhaf ışık şebekesini veya ikametgâhın girişindeki güç alanını gözlemledin mi?"
languages.original_text: "Sergeant, have you observed the strange light grid in the sky or the force field at the entrance to the residence?"

traits.locale_text: "Çavuş, gökyüzündeki o tuhaf ışık şebekesini veya ikametgâhın girişindeki güç alanını gözlemledin mi?"

languages.text: "Sergeant, habt Ihr das seltsame Lichtmuster am Himmel oder das Kraftfeld am Eingang der Residenz bemerkt?"
languages.original_text: "Sergeant, have you observed the strange light grid in the sky or the force field at the entrance to the residence?"

traits.locale_text: "Sergeant, habt Ihr das seltsame Lichtmuster am Himmel oder das Kraftfeld am Eingang der Residenz bemerkt?"

languages.text: 「軍曹、空に浮かぶ奇妙な光格子や、邸宅の入り口にあるエネルギー壁は、ごらんになったでしょうか？」
languages.original_text: "Sergeant, have you observed the strange light grid in the sky or the force field at the entrance to the residence?"

traits.locale_text: 「軍曹、空に浮かぶ奇妙な光格子や、邸宅の入り口にあるエネルギー壁は、ごらんになったでしょうか？」
